sprints.name: Foundation
sprints.description: Establish core infrastructure and basic antenna simulation capabilities

tasks.title: Define Core Antenna Types and Interfaces
tasks.description: Create Rust structs for antenna parameters, geometry, and simulation results
acceptance_criteria: AntennaGeometry trait defined with methods for mesh generation
SimulationParams struct with frequency, resolution, boundary conditions
SimulationResults struct with S-parameters, radiation patterns, efficiency

tasks.title: Implement Basic MoM Solver
tasks.description: Create Method of Moments solver for simple antenna structures
acceptance_criteria: MoM solver handles dipole and patch antennas

tasks.title: Create Basic UI Layout
tasks.description: Implement main application layout with panels for parameters and viewport

tasks.title: Setup 3D Viewport Infrastructure
tasks.description: Initialize Three.js viewport with basic camera controls
acceptance_criteria: Three.js scene initialized in React component
Basic grid and axis helpers displayed

tasks.title: Setup Python Environment and ML Pipeline
tasks.description: Configure Python environment with PyTorch and antenna ML libraries
acceptance_criteria: Basic data pipeline for antenna parameters established

sprints.name: Integration
sprints.description: Connect core simulation with GPU acceleration and UI visualization

tasks.title: Implement GPU-Accelerated Matrix Operations
tasks.description: Create wgpu compute shaders for MoM matrix operations

tasks.title: Create Tauri Command Handlers
tasks.description: Implement Tauri commands for simulation control from frontend

tasks.title: Build Antenna Parameter Controls
tasks.description: Create form controls for antenna dimensions and simulation settings
acceptance_criteria: Input fields for frequency, dimensions, materials

tasks.title: Implement Antenna Geometry Visualization
tasks.description: Render antenna structures based on parameter inputs
acceptance_criteria: Dipole and patch antenna geometries rendered

tasks.title: Create Surrogate Model Architecture
tasks.description: Design neural network for fast antenna performance prediction
acceptance_criteria: NN architecture defined for S-parameter prediction

sprints.name: Optimization
sprints.description: Add AI-driven optimization and advanced visualization features

tasks.title: Implement Optimization Algorithms
tasks.description: Create genetic algorithm and gradient-based optimizers for antenna design

tasks.title: Add Optimization Command Interface
tasks.description: Expose optimization controls through Tauri commands

tasks.title: Visualize Radiation Patterns
tasks.description: Render 3D radiation patterns with interactive controls

tasks.title: Create Optimization Dashboard
tasks.description: Build UI for optimization control and progress monitoring

shared_interfaces_needed.name: AntennaParams
shared_interfaces_needed.description: Common structure for antenna geometry and material properties

shared_interfaces_needed.name: SimulationResults
shared_interfaces_needed.description: Standardized format for S-parameters, patterns, and performance metrics

shared_interfaces_needed.name: OptimizationConfig
shared_interfaces_needed.description: Optimization objectives, constraints, and algorithm settings
